title: Supply Chain Optimization Platform
summary: A C++ OOP system for managing supply chain operations with real-time inventory tracking, demand forecasting, and logistics cost optimization. Built with advanced object-oriented design patterns.
problem: Manual operations and disconnected data made it difficult for teams to forecast demand and avoid stock-outs.
approach: Built a unified analytics pipeline for inventory, orders, and transportation events.
Implemented a forecasting model to flag demand spikes and replenishment windows.
Designed role-based dashboards for operations managers and executives.
impact: Reduced stock-out incidents by surfacing low-inventory alerts early.
Improved planning visibility with weekly forecast confidence reporting.
Decreased decision time through centralized KPI dashboards.

title: AI-Powered Portfolio
summary: A conversion-focused personal brand site with an AI chatbot assistant, dynamic contact forms, case study architecture, and SEO optimization. Built with Next.js 14 and deployed on Vercel.
problem: A static portfolio was not generating qualified leads or showcasing technical depth effectively.
approach: Redesigned the information architecture around conversion and proof.
Integrated contact and newsletter APIs with validation and anti-spam controls.
Added structured SEO metadata and machine-readable schema.
impact: Improved lead capture through stronger CTA placement.
Enabled consistent outreach via integrated newsletter.
Increased discoverability with full technical SEO setup.

title: APMS - Academic Planning & Mentorship
summary: A full MERN stack platform for academic performance tracking, mentor matching, and AI-assisted student roadmap planning. Built end-to-end from database schema to React frontend.
problem: Students lacked a structured way to plan degree paths and access mentorship at the right time.
approach: Designed a modular planner with semester-aware recommendations.
Created mentor discovery and request workflows.
Added AI support for roadmap suggestions and career hints.
impact: Higher planning clarity with guided course sequencing.
Faster mentor connection through profile filtering.
Better retention using milestone-based progress tracking.

title: C++ Supply Chain Management System
summary: A deeply object-oriented C++ system modeling suppliers, warehouses, and transport operations.
problem: Need for a realistic OOP project that demonstrates inheritance, polymorphism, and data modeling in C++.
approach: Modeled core entities with extensible class hierarchies.
Implemented polymorphic behaviors for operations and reporting.
Used file persistence for data storage and retrieval.
impact: Demonstrated advanced OOP fluency for academic and interview settings.
Created reusable architecture patterns for future C++ projects.
Improved debugging and maintainability through separation of concerns.
